name: computer-use-omni
description: Anthropic's computer-use tool surface, for Windows.
long_description:
computer-use-omni is a faithful 1:1 replica of Anthropic's official computer-use tool surface, shipped as a plain MCP server for Windows. Same tool names, same parameters, same coordinate semantics — an agent that already knows the official tool works here unchanged.

29 tools cover the full surface: screenshots, mouse (click / drag / scroll), keyboard (Unicode typing, key chords), clipboard, multi-monitor capture with self-describing screenshots, and honest application launching that reports what actually happened instead of fire-and-forget.

What makes it different from the built-in computer use: every granted app runs at full tier. The agent can type into IDEs and terminals, and open_application accepts a full path to a loose .exe — so it can launch the app you are currently building, click through it, type into it, and verify behavior before you ship. That is the workflow it was built for. Full power, your responsibility.

It reproduces Claude Desktop's on-screen affordances (orange edge glow, "Claude is using your computer" pill), guards against keyboard self-harm (keystrokes are blocked when the controlling window is frontmost), and ships a 16-scenario end-to-end test suite run through a fresh MCP process. Runs entirely locally: no telemetry, no accounts, no server side. MIT licensed, in daily use since 2026-06.

tools.name: computer_batch
tools.description: Run a list of actions sequentially against the pre-batch screenshot's coordinates.

tools.name: cursor_position
tools.description: Return the current cursor position in image-space coordinates of the last screenshot.

tools.name: deactivate
tools.description: End the computer-use session WITHOUT killing the MCP process.

tools.name: display_overview
tools.description: Return ONE composite image of ALL monitors, laid out as arranged on the virtual desktop.

tools.name: double_click
tools.description: Double-click at an image-space coordinate; optional 'text' holds modifiers.

tools.name: hold_key
tools.description: Hold a key chord down for 'duration' seconds, then release it.

tools.name: key
tools.description: Press a key chord (e.g. 'Return', 'ctrl+a', 'alt+F4'), optionally repeated.

tools.name: left_click
tools.description: Left-click at an image-space coordinate; optional 'text' holds modifiers (e.g. 'ctrl+shift').

tools.name: left_click_drag
tools.description: Drag with the left button to 'coordinate'; start at 'start_coordinate' or the current cursor.

tools.name: left_mouse_down
tools.description: Press and hold the left mouse button at the current cursor position.

tools.name: left_mouse_up
tools.description: Release the left mouse button at the current cursor position.

tools.name: list_granted_applications
tools.description: List the applications currently granted in this session, plus grant flags.

tools.name: middle_click
tools.description: Middle-click at an image-space coordinate; optional 'text' holds modifiers.

tools.name: mouse_move
tools.description: Move the mouse to an image-space coordinate [x, y].

tools.name: open_application
tools.description: Resolve and launch an application, bringing it to the foreground.

tools.name: read_clipboard
tools.description: Read text from the system clipboard (requires clipboardRead grant).

tools.name: request_access
tools.description: Request access to applications (and optional clipboard/system-key capabilities).

tools.name: request_teach_access
tools.description: Request teach-mode access (phase-2 stub).

tools.name: right_click
tools.description: Right-click at an image-space coordinate; optional 'text' holds modifiers.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture the active monitor and return a PNG image (windows of non-allowlisted apps masked).

tools.name: scroll
tools.description: Scroll at an image-space coordinate. Direction: up/down/left/right; amount in wheel ticks.

tools.name: switch_display
tools.description: Switch which monitor subsequent screenshots capture (and clicks target).

tools.name: teach_batch
tools.description: Teach-mode batch (phase-2 stub): executes each step's actions, then returns a final screenshot.

tools.name: teach_step
tools.description: Teach-mode step (phase-2 stub): executes the actions, then returns a screenshot.

tools.name: triple_click
tools.description: Triple-click at an image-space coordinate; optional 'text' holds modifiers.

tools.name: type
tools.description: Type Unicode text at the current focus (layout-independent, supports CJK/emoji).

tools.name: wait
tools.description: Wait for 'duration' seconds.

tools.name: write_clipboard
tools.description: Write text to the system clipboard (requires clipboardWrite grant).

tools.name: zoom
tools.description: Crop a region [x0, y0, x1, y1] of the screen (image space) and return it upscaled 2x. Read-only.
